Bash(cd "D:\\WORK\\Facecanusev3offline\\facex\\samplecode\\ArcFaceDemo" && python << 'EOF'
with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Replace library_not_found
old1 = b'library_not_found">\\xe6\\x9c\\xaa\\xe6\\x89\\xbe\\xe5\\x88\\xb0\\xe5\\xba\\x93\\xe6\\x96\\x87\\xe4\\xbb\\xb6\\xef\\xbc\\x8c\\xe8\\xaf\\xb7\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\x9f\\xa5\\xe6\\x98\\xaf\\xe5\\x90\\xa6\\xe6\\x9c\\x89\\xe5\\xb0\\x86.so\\xe6\\x96\\x87\\xe4\\xbb\\xb6\\xe6\\x94\\xbe\\xe8\\x87\\xb3\\xe5\\xb7\\xa5\\xe7\\xa8\\x8b\\xe7\\x9a\\x84 app\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\main\\\\\\\\jniLibs \\xe7\\x9b\\xae\\xe5\\xbd\\x95\\xe4\\xb8\\x8b</string>'
new1 = b'library_not_found">Library file not found, please check .so files in app/src/main/jniLibs directory</string>'

# Replace ft_op_0
old2 = b'ft_op_0">\\xe8\\xa7\\x86\\xe9\\xa2\\x91\\xe6\\xa8\\xa1\\xe5\\xbc\\x8f\\xe4\\xbb\\x85\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\xb5\\x8b0\\xe5\\xba\\xa6</string>'
new2 = b'ft_op_0">Video mode detect 0 degree only</string>'

# Replace ft_op_90
old3 = b'ft_op_90">\\xe8\\xa7\\x86\\xe9\\xa2\\x91\\xe6\\xa8\\xa1\\xe5\\xbc\\x8f\\xe4\\xbb\\x85\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\xb5\\x8b90\\xe5\\xba\\xa6</string>'
new3 = b'ft_op_90">Video mode detect 90 degree only</string>'

# Replace ft_op_180
old4 = b'ft_op_180">\\xe8\\xa7\\x86\\xe9\\xa2\\x91\\xe6\\xa8\\xa1\\xe5\\xbc\\x8f\\xe4\\xbb\\x85\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\xb5\\x8b180\\xe5\\xba\\xa6</string>'
new4 = b'ft_op_180">Video mode detect 180 degree only</string>'

# Replace ft_op_270
old5 = b'ft_op_270">\\xe8\\xa7\\x86\\xe9\\xa2\\x91\\xe6\\xa8\\xa1\\xe5\\xbc\\x8f\\xe4\\xbb\\x85\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\xb5\\x8b270\\xe5\\xba\\xa6</string>'
new5 = b'ft_op_270">Video mode detect 270 degree only</string>'

content = content.replace\(old1, new1\)
content = content.replace\(old2, new2\)
content = content.replace\(old3, new3\)
content = content.replace\(old4, new4\)
content = content.replace\(old5, new5\)

with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
    
print\('Done'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\WORK\\Facecanusev3offline\\facex\\samplecode\\ArcFaceDemo" && python << 'EOF'
with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

import re
match = re.search\(b'library_not_found.*?</string>', content\)
if match:
    print\('Current:', repr\(match.group\(\)\)\)
    print\('Hex:', match.group\(\).hex\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\WORK\\Facecanusev3offline\\facex\\samplecode\\ArcFaceDemo" && python << 'EOF'
with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Replace library_not_found - exact bytes
old1 = b'library_not_found">\\xe6\\x9c\\xaa\\xe6\\x89\\xbe\\xe5\\x88\\xb0\\xe5\\xba\\x93\\xe6\\x96\\x87\\xe4\\xbb\\xb6\\xef\\xbc\\x8c\\xe8\\xaf\\xb7\\xe6\\xa3\\x80\\xe6\\x9f\\xa5\\xe6\\x98\\xaf\\xe5\\x90\\xa6\\xe6\\x9c\\x89\\xe5\\xb0\\x86.so\\xe6\\x96\\x87\\xe4\\xbb\\xb6\\xe6\\x94\\xbe\\xe8\\x87\\xb3\\xe5\\xb7\\xa5\\xe7\\xa8\\x8b\\xe7\\x9a\\x84 app\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\main\\\\\\\\jniLibs \\xe7\\x9b\\xae\\xe5\\xbd\\x95\\xe4\\xb8\\x8b</string>'
new1 = b'library_not_found">Library file not found, please check .so files in app/src/main/jniLibs directory</string>'

if old1 in content:
    content = content.replace\(old1, new1\)
    print\('Replaced library_not_found'\)
else:
    print\('NOT FOUND'\)
    
with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\WORK\\Facecanusev3offline\\facex\\samplecode\\ArcFaceDemo" && python << 'EOF'
with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find and replace using regex for the remaining Chinese in Settings UI
import re

# Replace library_not_found value
pattern = rb'\(library_not_found">\)[^<]*\(</string>\)'
replacement = b'\\\\1Library file not found, please check .so files in app/src/main/jniLibs directory\\\\2'
content = re.sub\(pattern, replacement, content\)

with open\('app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)
    
print\('Done'\)
EOF)
